texto: More than half of my life is past
autor: I have left only the time I need for turning the rest of it to account and for effacing my errors by my virtues.
explicacao: Citação de I have left only the time I need for turning the rest of it to account and for effacing my errors by my virtues. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “More than half of my life is past” articula reflexao, jean-jacques-rousseau em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
